arts.sum: Leao, of course, is regarded as one of the best wide players in European football and suitors, like Arsenal, will be well aware of his situation and the potential opportunities it presents. FootballTransfers understands that Arsenal have approached the representatives of Rafael Leao regarding a potential transfer.
